name: Mensagia API
description: Mensagia is a multi-channel messaging platform API supporting SMS, Email, Voice campaigns, 2-Factor Authentication, certified messaging, and contact management. The API allows sending simple and bulk SMS/email messages, managing contacts and groups, creating campaigns, and tracking delivery notifications.
